title: Represents numbers A
blurb: Place value into the millions, and decimals to thousandths.

title: Represents numbers B
blurb: Integers on the number line, and benchmark percentages.

title: Additive relations A
blurb: Mental and written strategies for adding and subtracting.

title: Additive relations B
blurb: Multistep problems and adding and subtracting decimals.

title: Multiplicative relations A
blurb: Products, factors, multiplication and division strategies.

title: Multiplicative relations B
blurb: Decimals by powers of 10, patterns and order of operations.

title: Representing quantity fractions A
blurb: Comparing unit fractions and adding fractions with the same denominator.

title: Representing quantity fractions B
blurb: Equivalent fractions, related denominators and fractions of quantities.

title: Geometric measure A
blurb: Coordinates, length and distance, perimeter and measuring angles.

title: Geometric measure B
blurb: Four quadrants, unit conversion and angle relationships.

title: Two-dimensional spatial structure A
blurb: Classifying 2D shapes and the area of rectangles.

title: Two-dimensional spatial structure B
blurb: Transformations and the area of composites, parallelograms and triangles.

title: Three-dimensional spatial structure A
blurb: Prisms, pyramids, nets and measuring capacity.

title: Three-dimensional spatial structure B
blurb: Building 3D objects and the volume of rectangular prisms.

title: Non-spatial measure A
blurb: Measuring mass and working with 12- and 24-hour time.

title: Non-spatial measure B
blurb: Converting mass units and solving duration problems.

title: Data A
blurb: Collecting data and constructing graphs and timelines.

title: Data B
blurb: Comparing data displays and spotting misleading graphs.

title: Chance A
blurb: Listing equally likely outcomes and probabilities as fractions.

title: Chance B
blurb: Observed versus expected frequencies and random generators.

title: Computation with integers
blurb: Comparing, ordering and calculating with positive and negative integers.

title: Fractions, decimals and percentages
blurb: Operating with and converting between fractions, decimals and percentages.

title: Ratios and rates
blurb: Simplifying ratios and rates and reading distance–time graphs.

title: Algebraic techniques
blurb: Pronumerals, simplifying, expanding and factorising expressions.

title: Indices
blurb: Index notation, roots, prime factors and the index laws.

title: Equations
blurb: Solving linear equations and simple quadratics.

title: Linear relationships
blurb: Patterns, equations and graphs of straight lines on the Cartesian plane.

title: Length
blurb: Perimeter of composite figures and the circumference of circles.

title: Right-angled triangles (Pythagoras' theorem)
blurb: Using Pythagoras' theorem to find sides and test right angles.

title: Area
blurb: Area formulas for quadrilaterals, circles and composite shapes.

title: Volume
blurb: Volume and capacity of right prisms and cylinders.

title: Angle relationships
blurb: Angles at a point and angles formed by transversals on parallel lines.

title: Properties of geometrical figures
blurb: Properties of triangles and quadrilaterals and angle-sum proofs.

title: Data classification and visualisation
blurb: Classifying data and displaying it with appropriate graphs.

title: Data analysis
blurb: Measures of centre and spread, outliers and the shape of data.

title: Probability
blurb: Sample spaces, theoretical and observed probability, and complements.

blurb: Earning and spending money and simple interest.

title: Financial mathematics B
blurb: Compound interest and depreciation.

title: Algebraic techniques A
blurb: Algebraic fractions, expanding and binomial products.

title: Indices A
blurb: Index laws with variables and negative-integer indices.

title: Equations A
blurb: Linear equations up to 3 steps, including one algebraic fraction.

title: Linear relationships A
blurb: Midpoint, gradient, distance and graphing straight lines.

title: Linear relationships B
blurb: Gradient–intercept form and parallel/perpendicular lines.

title: Non-linear relationships A
blurb: Connecting algebra and graphs of quadratics and exponentials.

title: Non-linear relationships B
blurb: Features of parabolas and exponential curves.

title: Numbers of any magnitude
blurb: Measurement error, significant figures and scientific notation.

blurb: Trigonometric ratios in right-angled triangles.

title: Trigonometry B
blurb: Angles of elevation and depression, and bearings.

blurb: Composite areas and surface areas of prisms and cylinders.

title: Volume A
blurb: Volumes of composite prisms and cylinders.

title: Properties of geometrical figures A
blurb: Similar figures, scale factors and scale drawings.

blurb: Standard deviation, quartiles, IQR and box plots.

title: Data analysis B
blurb: Bivariate data, scatter plots and lines of best fit.

title: Probability A
blurb: Multistage experiments with independent and dependent events.

blurb: Direct and inverse variation and their graphs.

title: Variation and rates of change B
blurb: Constant and variable rates of change from graphs.

blurb: Algebraic fractions, common factors and binomial products.

blurb: Special products and factorising harder expressions.

title: Indices B
blurb: Negative-integer indices with algebraic expressions.

title: Indices C
blurb: Surds and fractional indices.

title: Equations B
blurb: Monic quadratics, cubics and linear inequalities.

blurb: Quadratic methods, literal and simultaneous equations.

blurb: Midpoint, gradient, distance and equations of lines.

blurb: Operating with, dividing and graphing polynomials.

blurb: Logarithms, their laws and applications.

blurb: Function notation, domain and range, and inequalities.

blurb: 3D trigonometry and the sine, cosine and area rules.

title: Trigonometry D
blurb: The unit circle, trig graphs and trig equations.

blurb: Surface area of pyramids, cones, spheres and composites.

blurb: Volume of pyramids, cones, spheres and composites.

blurb: Congruence, similarity and polygon angle properties.

blurb: Formal proofs with congruent and similar triangles.

blurb: Chord, angle, tangent and secant properties of circles.

blurb: Graphs, planar graphs, Euler's formula and Eulerian trails.

blurb: Planning and reviewing a statistical inquiry.

blurb: Venn diagrams, 2-way tables and conditional probability.

title: Formulas and equations
blurb: Substituting into and rearranging formulas, and applying them in real contexts.

title: Linear relationships
blurb: Modelling straight-line relationships and direct variation.

blurb: Wages, salaries, commission, taxation and net pay.

blurb: Purchasing goods, GST, vehicles and personal budgeting.

blurb: Unit conversion, perimeter, area, surface area and volume.

title: Time and location
blurb: Latitude, longitude, time zones and UTC.

blurb: Network diagrams, minimum spanning trees and shortest paths.

title: Data analysis
blurb: Sampling, data displays, measures of centre and spread, and box plots.

blurb: Simultaneous, exponential, quadratic and reciprocal relationships.

blurb: Interest, depreciation, shares, loans and credit cards.

blurb: Right-angled and non-right-angled triangle trigonometry and bearings.

blurb: Ratios, scale, rates, distance–time graphs and energy use.

blurb: Precedence tables, scanning, the critical path and Gantt charts.

blurb: Scatter plots, correlation and least-squares regression.

blurb: Sample spaces, multistage events and relative frequency.

blurb: The bell curve, z-scores and the empirical rule.

blurb: Functions, lines, parabolas, circles and the algebra that underpins them.

blurb: Exact ratios, angles of any magnitude, radians, arcs and sectors.

blurb: Reciprocal, Pythagorean and complementary identities, and trig equations.

blurb: Reflecting, translating and dilating the graphs of functions.

blurb: Sets, probability rules, conditional probability and summarising data.

blurb: Arithmetic and geometric sequences, series and limiting sums.

blurb: Differentiating exponential, logarithmic and trigonometric functions.

title: Financial mathematics
